SEARCH

Package org.eolang.jeo

package org.eolang.jeo
The main classes of the jeo-maven-plugin. jeo is a maven plugin dedicated to optimizing java bytecode. It is a root package of the project where you can find the main classes of the plugin.
Since:
0.1.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.eolang.jeo.matchers
    It is a package with useful hamcrest matchers.
    org.eolang.jeo.representation
    Core representation classes for Java bytecode and XMIR conversion.

    Description
    AssembleMojo
    Assembles XMIR representation of Java bytecode into executable class files.

    Assembling
    Assembling transformation.
    Caching
    Cached transformation.
    DisassembleMojo
    Disassembles Java bytecode into XMIR representation.
    Disassembler
    Disassembler for bytecode classes.
    Disassembling
    Disassembling transformation.
    GlobFilter
    Filter that matches paths against a set of glob patterns.
    JeoClassLoader
    JEO class loader.
    Logging
    Logging transformation decorator.
    MavenPath
    Maven file path resolver.
    ParallelTranslator
    Translator that applies a translation to a batch of representations in parallel.
    PluginStartup
    Plugin initialization and setup.
    Summary
    Translation summary log.

    Translator
    Translator that applies a translation to a batch of representations.
